title: alchemilla vulgaris subsp. oxyodonta
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. oxyodonta, commonly known as lady's mantle, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing tannins, flavonoids, and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla vulgaris subsp. oxyodonta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
